metadata.name: Request Additional Labor to Accelerate Schedule

description: To get back on schedule after a delay, a project manager needs to request two additional carpenters for the framing crew for one week.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the framing task to determine if adding labor will decrease its duration.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that the task is labor-intensive and can be accelerated.

nodes.task_description: Submit a request to the resource manager for two additional carpenters for a specific one-week period.

expected_outcome.value: A formal resource request is sent.
